pages.title: 心: temporary life
pages.text: Position: everyday padding. 心 raises temporary max health and refreshes the newest expiry when recast.$(br2)It is cheap and visible, but capped. Wooden 心 cannot turn you into a boss.

pages.title: 心 tiers
pages.text: Wood +3 hearts/cap 5 hearts/90s$(br)Stone +4/6/2m$(br)Copper +5/8/3m$(br)Iron +5/10/5m, Regeneration II 3s$(br)Gold +6/10/3m, Regen II 5s$(br)Diamond +6/10/8m, Regen II 8s$(br)Netherite +6/10/10m, Regen II 10s

pages.title: 命: low-tier death ward
pages.text: Position: cheap fatal-hit insurance. When lethal damage arrives, 命 locks you at 1 health and grants brief invulnerability.$(br2)It does not clear ink wound or negative effects.

pages.title: 救: full rescue
pages.text: Position: harder character, stronger rescue. On lethal damage, 救 locks health, grants invulnerability, and clears ink wound by tier.$(br2)救 is stronger than 命 because it has more strokes. Wood cannot cast it reliably.

pages.title: 救 tiers
pages.text: Wood not stable$(br)Stone 5m, 3s invulnerable, clears 25% ink wound$(br)Copper 8m, 4s, 40%$(br)Iron 10m, 5s, 60%$(br)Gold 6m, 5s, 60%$(br)Diamond 10m, 5s, 80%$(br)Netherite 10m, 5s, 100%
